eligibilityOutcome.summary: Eligible to use the private sale/transfer online service: not selling to a motor trader or garage, and the new keeper is not registering the vehicle abroad.

safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (gb/dvla/vehicle-keeper-change-v5c). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to DVLA or any government system, and the vehicle registration number/V5C reference number above are fabricated examples, not a real vehicle record — this schema's own author confirmed (see VERIFICATION.md) that the live service rejects invented reference pairs with 'Unable to find a vehicle record'. A human (the seller) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and explicitly authorize submission through DVLA's own channel (https://change-private-vehicle-sale.service.gov.uk/) before this notification is filed. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
